settings.label: Custom CSS
settings.description: Add custom CSS styles applied only to this gallery or album.

settings.label: CSS Code
settings.hint:
Use SELECTOR to target this {postType} wrapper - e.g. SELECTOR.fg-item { border: 2px solid red; }.
All rules are automatically scoped so they only affect this {postType}.
Harmful constructs such as break-outs, @import, and expression() are blocked before output.
